georgia.name: Georgia Program
georgia.headline: A Journey Started with Love
georgia.subheadline: Georgia — World Leader in Surrogacy with a 20-Year Legal Framework
georgia.legalNote: Georgia Civil Code, Article 143 — Surrogacy is fully legal. Intended parents are registered as the legal parents at birth.
georgia.quizIntro: Take the 30-second qualification test for the Georgia program

myths.truth: Completely false! Georgia offers one of the most liberal legal frameworks for surrogacy in the world. The Civil Code directly permits surrogacy.

myths.myth: Surrogate mother can keep the child
myths.truth: By Georgian law, the surrogate mother has no legal rights to the child. The birth certificate is issued directly to the intended parents.

myths.myth: The process is expensive and inaccessible
myths.truth: The Georgia program costs 40% of Western European rates, while the quality and legal protection are identical or even higher.
Tbilisi's leading clinics are accredited to European standards. Our partner clinics are ISO certified.

greece.name: Greece Program
greece.headline: Family Dream at the Head of the Mediterranean
greece.subheadline: Greece — The only EU country where surrogacy is legal for foreigners
greece.legalNote: Greek Law 3305/2005 — Surrogacy is allowed with court permission. Optimal legal security for EU citizens.
greece.quizIntro: Take the 30-second qualification test for the Greece program

myths.truth: Court permission is issued in 3-4 months on average. Our legal team handles all paperwork without requiring your presence.
Law 3305/2005 allows EU citizens and, under certain conditions, other foreign citizens as well. Our team will assess your qualification.
On the contrary — Greece has the most structured judicial oversight in Europe, protecting all parties involved.
Athens clinics meet the highest EU standards. All medications are EMA (European Medicines Agency) certified.

medicalTab.chartSub: 🎉 **10.2 mm** represents the ideal medical thickness for embryo transfer (clinical range: 8–14 mm).

Hello Lile! Very well. A bit nervous about the 25th 😊
That's completely natural! 💙 Remember — the whole team is with you. The protocol is followed exactly. You are doing great.
